skills.description: Retrieve relevant context chunks from the bound real-wire MCP retriever for a query. Real-wire impl per D75 §B.1; activates D50 §B.1 SkillExecutionError forward-bar; resolves D50 §D D-5 composition contract by WRAPping AdapterCallError as SkillExecutionError(category='external-dependency-error') with __cause__ chain.
